_comment: Alibaba Cloud (alicloud_) is one of Alethia's four managed clouds but has NO authored control set yet, and it carries RAM/OIDC authority — so it is deliberately OFF the supported-no-controls allowlist. An all-alicloud plan is honestly not_evaluable (SCOPE-001), NOT a vacuous pass. This closes a real prior false-PASS. When alicloud controls are authored, this becomes fail/pass on its own merits.
